requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Malaysia's EV charging infrastructure is aligned with the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem. The Malaysian government, through the National Electric Mobility Blueprint and the EV Roadmap, has indicated adoption of the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler for AC charging and the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF, for DC fast charging. ChargEV — Malaysia's national public EV charging network — deploys IEC 62196-compliant charging stations. IEC 62196 connector conformity is a technical interoperability requirement and becomes a mandatory project requirement when written into ST equipment guidelines, network operator, tender, or charge-point-operator specifications. CHAdeMO inlets may be included at some multi-standard DC stations but are not the Malaysia primary standard direction.
summary.zh: 马来西亚电动汽车充电基础设施与IEC 62196接口体系对接。马来西亚政府通过《国家电动出行蓝图》和电动汽车路线图，已明确采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器用于交流充电，以及IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）用于直流快充。马来西亚国家公共电动汽车充电网络ChargEV部署的充电站符合IEC 62196标准。IEC 62196接口符合性属于技术互操作要求；当其写入ST设备指引、网络运营商、招标或充电点运营商规范时，即成为项目强制要求。部分多标准直流充电站可能设有CHAdeMO接口，但其不是马来西亚主要标准方向。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞電動汽車充電基礎設施與IEC 62196接口體系對接。馬來西亞政府通過《國家電動出行藍圖》和電動汽車路線圖，已明確採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器用於交流充電，以及IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）用於直流快充。馬來西亞國家公共電動汽車充電網絡ChargEV部署的充電站符合IEC 62196標準。IEC 62196接口符合性屬於技術互操作要求；當其寫入ST設備指引、網絡運營商、招標或充電點運營商規範時，即成為項目強制要求。部分多標準直流充電站可能設有CHAdeMO接口，但其不是馬來西亞主要標準方向。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
MS IEC 61851-1 — Malaysian adopted standard for EV conductive charging system
ChargEV national EV charging network technical specifications

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall outline to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically distinct from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus communication via GB/T 27930, which is incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack deployed in Malaysia's IEC-aligned charging network.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外观与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与马来西亚IEC体系充电网络所用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外觀與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與馬來西亞IEC體系充電網絡所用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 Malaysia deployments. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required), labelling, test reports, temperature-rise and humidity-exposure evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters must confirm the connector type required by the specific ST, ChargEV network, CPO, or tender specification before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于马来西亚Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在要求时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升及湿度暴露证据和备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在报价前须确认具体ST规范、ChargEV网络、充电点运营商或招标要求的接口类型。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於馬來西亞Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在要求時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升及濕度暴露證據和備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在報價前須確認具體ST規範、ChargEV網絡、充電點運營商或招標要求的接口類型。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by ST equipment guidelines, ChargEV network specification, network operator, tender, or project specification; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Confirm whether the Malaysia deployment requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认马来西亚部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認馬來西亞部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。
